text_block_list.name: Sirius Symboli
text_block_list.text:
Well, well... If it isn't the Emperor herself. Have you come all this way
just to see how the common folk amuse themselves?

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Don't be so defensive. I'll leave as soon as I've finished my business
here. As the student council president, I have a favor to ask you.

text_block_list.name: Sirius Symboli
text_block_list.text: A favor?

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
I'll get straight to the point. I want you to convince the students in
your orbit to participate in the Ligne Droite.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Following a student suggestion, we've officially decided to introduce
DJ time into the event. We've even requested the music artist
mentioned by the student body to appear as a guest.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
This new school year will begin with more pomp and splendor than
any before. None of this is mandatory, of course, but I promise that
you'll each benefit from it.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
A world of possibility awaits... I want this to show that all students
have a prosperous future ahead of them. My wish is that the start of a
new term inspires everyone to climb to greater heights.

text_block_list.name: Sirius Symboli
text_block_list.text:
I see now! You're lowering the bar for the underachievers who can't
even take a single step on their own!

text_block_list.name: Sirius Symboli
text_block_list.text:
All that's left is to make me, the top dog, feel important by bowing
your head. Then I'll bring all my followers in line, right?

text_block_list.name: Sirius Symboli
text_block_list.text: Well, I'm not amused. You'd do well to keep your ego in check.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: My ego? What do you mean?

text_block_list.name: Sirius Symboli
text_block_list.text:
Ha, don't play dumb. "Celebrating the new school year" sounds nice
and all, but it's all for your own benefit. And you say it'll make us
happy? Please.

text_block_list.name: Sirius Symboli
text_block_list.text: A "prosperous future"? "Climb to greater heights"? You just want to be the one who bestows those things upon us... If that's not ego, I don't know what is.

text_block_list.name: Sirius Symboli
text_block_list.text:
I know you think you're bringing the gospel... But admit your
arrogance, Rudolf. You believe you're some kind of chosen one!

text_block_list.name: Sirius Symboli
text_block_list.text:
Heh, if we're clear now, then be on your way. I'm not getting on your
"ark." If you're going to keep insisting, then you'd better grab a cue
already.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: You there. May I borrow your cue?

text_block_list.name: Sirius's Follower A
text_block_list.text: Huh? Oh, s-sure!

text_block_list.name: Sirius's Follower A
text_block_list.text: Whoa, that jump shot was high! And the angle... It was perfect...

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Have you forgotten, Sirius? I learned that technique because you
begged me to... I suppose I'll never surpass the me in your memories.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
There's no point if you're unwilling, so I take it back—your assistance
isn't required. I'll simply make more announcements. Pardon the
interruption.

text_block_list.name: Sirius's Follower A
text_block_list.text:
Geez... The president's just as scary as you'd think. Hey, what was all
that about memories?

text_block_list.name: Sirius Symboli
text_block_list.text: This isn't like her...

text_block_list.name: Sirius's Follower A
text_block_list.text: Hm?

text_block_list.name: Sirius Symboli
text_block_list.text:
Nothing. It pains me to say she and I are old friends. But anyway, are
you two going to the Droit? Tell me the truth.

text_block_list.name: Sirius's Follower A
text_block_list.text:
N-nah... I figured I'd skip again. Too much pressure. My racing
performance doesn't really deserve some fancy dress... You know?

text_block_list.name: Sirius's Follower B
text_block_list.text:
Oh, y-yeah... Same here, I guess. It's not like having DJ time changes
anything really...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: A few days later...

text_block_list.name: Students
text_block_list.text: AAAAAH!

text_block_list.name: Students
text_block_list.text:
You're so beautiful, Fuji!
Woooow, stunning...

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: Thank you, everyone. Now, where might she be...

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Come out, come out. Don't hide, my date. Won't you honor us with
your presence?

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Well! You look positively marvelous! While still formal, your attire still
does justice to your playful spirit. Hehe, you're sending my heart
aflutter.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Yeah, I figured. Pretty words sure come easy to you, huh?

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
I'm only speaking from my heart. Maybe you should do the same. So?
How's my dress look?

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: ...You're nothing short of a goddess or whatever.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: Hehe, we've finished with our outfits, so let's just forget all that and enjoy ourselves. We made a deal, right?

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: A deal?

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: Yes, seeing that you'll most definitely refuse any invitation, even though I must have you no matter what...

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
I have no other option but to force you to accept, by sweetening the
offer. If you go with me, I'll give you something you really want.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Oh, and you know what that is?

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
I'm a dorm leader. If ever you need a quiet place to nap, you can use
my room. Or I could hold a scrimmage for you to race in.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
I could even... get you a race with famous G1 winners. Almost any
wish you have would be mine to grant.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Hm... But why are you so bent on going with me? I'm no master dancer
or anything. And as you can see, I have zero desire to do it.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: You did try flattering me with that "trickster" talk... Sure you don't have some ulterior motive?

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
It's just like I said. I simply want the Droit to be great. And I knew
you'd be just the person to make that happen.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: (Oh, come on. Who is she kidding? I know she's hiding something... maybe...)
